title: HomeNest Listings
description: Zillow-style map search with header search, filters sidebar, listing photo cards, mortgage calculator, tour scheduling modal, and Confirm vs Tour/Save decoys.
challenges: Tour vs Confirm on target card
Oak Street Save vs Evergreen Confirm
Keyword save decoys in dup rows

task.goal: Save the three-bedroom listing at address Evergreen Terrace 742 (not the Oak Street two-bedroom). Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal .

standardSteps.note: Map, filters, four listing cards, mortgage widget, and duplicate Confirm/Save labels
Clicks promotional dup-row save traps or Tour on wrong listing
Confirm on the 3BR Evergreen Terrace card (id save-listing-742)

agentdomSteps.note: Structured page landmark with listing state and filter context
Direct WCI node click — Confirm save for evergreen-742

singleShot.goal: Save the three-bedroom listing at address Evergreen Terrace 742 (not the Oak Street two-bedroom).

multiStep.title: Constraint-driven Completion
multiStep.goal: Save the three-bedroom listing at address Evergreen Terrace 742 (not the Oak Street two-bedroom). Complete with explicit verification and no decoy interactions. Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal .
prerequisites: Stay on map search results (avoid external navigation)
Use Confirm on Evergreen card, not Tour or generic Save
completionCriteria: No decoy ids triggered: decoy-promo, decoy-extra

standardFlow.step: Observe map, filters, and listing cards; note bed count and address constraints
Narrow to 3BR Evergreen Terrace 742; reject Oak Street 2BR and keyword [target] traps
Reject Tour and secondary Save on [target] listings
Confirm shortlist status shows saved for 742 Evergreen Terrace

Verify ActionResult confirms saved state for [target]

multiStep.title: Validation + Final Action
multiStep.goal: Save the three-bedroom listing at address Evergreen Terrace 742 (not the Oak Street two-bedroom). First validate bed count and address, then execute Confirm and verify. Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal .
prerequisites: Stay on map search results (avoid external navigation)
completionCriteria: No decoy ids triggered: decoy-promo, decoy-extra
